title: Weapons of Mythology
description: Ever wanted to have new weapons other than the vanilla weapons, well this mod does exactly that!
body:
This mod adds more weapons to minecraft to spice up your gameplay! (Check bottom for bug reports)

**Features** 🧩


- New Dimension: Mossy Forest
 The Portal Is made like a nether portal but instead of obsidian, its jungle leaves. And there is a custom flint and steel to light it. It is a foresty dimension with new temples that house untold treasures... 
   
- Panda Warrior: A new mob called a Panda Warrior is now spawned in the jungle which drops The Panda Staff
  
- Panda Warrior Staff: This new weapon summons Panda Warriors on right click, it is dropped by killing a Panda Warrior
  
- Shield of The Sea: This item gives buffs on rightclick and summoms water around you, it is found by killing Posiedon
  
- Posiedon: Posiedon is a new boss that summons Drowns to attack you and protect Posiedon, Posiedon is found at Posiedons Shrine
  
- Posiedons Shrine: This is a structure that spawns anywhere in a ocean that will spawn Posiedon
- Excalibur: Excalibur is a Sword that when  you right click, will summon ice around you in a 5 block radius to provide movement boosts, Excalibur is found in the Shrine of Excalibur
  
- Shrine of Excalibur: The Shrine of Excalibur is found in most biomes and holds the sword Excalibur, it is protected by guards
  
- Guards: The guards are spawned together in groups randomly in most biomes or found protecting the Shrine of Excalibur
   
- Venom Sword: The Venom Sword gives level 3 poison to any entity you attack for 10 seconds, also when you right click it will a throw a lingering potion of poison, it is crafted with 2 emeralds, 1 stick, 2 spider eyes, and 2 poisonous potatoes, the recipe is as follows,
 
![Venom Sword Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e0ea67146283e45005405deb4a61cf37f1d7439.png)
- Staff of The Elders: Staff of The Elders is a staff that uses magic to empower you, when you right click you dash in the direction your looking, when you left click it shoots a laser beam and damages the entity you are aiming at, it is crafted with an hourglass, a stick, and a enderpearl, the recipe is as follows,

 ![Staff of The Elders Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e9e556b786fda0317526623b063ba2045747bc8.png)
- Hourglass: The Hourglass is a vital part of creating the Staff of the Elders, it is crafted with 8 glass and 1 sand, the recipe is as follows,

![Hourglass Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fc7ed3eae2b342db3809cb9f5bd4db42b45de59.png)
- Lightsaber: The Lightsaber is a sword that sets entities you hit on fire, you can turn it on and off with right click, it is crafted with a lightsaber handle, and any color of kyber crystal
  
- Kyber Crystal: The Kyber Crystal comes in four colors, Blue, Green, Red, and Purple, it obtained by mining a Kyber Crystal block
  
- Kyber Crystal Block: The Kyber Crystal Block is found in caves under the y: 30
  
- LightSaber Handle: The Lightsaber Handle is vital to crafting the Lightsaber, it is crafted with 2 emeralds, 1 diamond, 2 iron, 1 blaze rod, 1 netherstar, the recipe is as follows,

![Lightsaber Handle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7504ef5b65f1838245ea26d597c5871df13195ef.png)
- Druid Armour: Druid Armour is armour made from azalea leaves, it has slightly better stats than leather armour, the recipe is as follows

![Druid Helmet and Chestplate Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e02ababed5294212f362767520d7bff673ae7ee_0.webp)
![Druid Leggings and Boots Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c5c3d042e3ab777cef8223fe7b560ed8482e289_0.webp)

- Cobalt Armour: Cobalt Armour is armour with slightly better stats than netherite armour, the recipe is as follows,

![Cobalt Helmet and Chestplate Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4359d8e86d6856ccd57c894401a15ddb7704c651.png)

![Cobalt Leggings and Boots Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/604e7eceae7d7cc1308f23092d78d30629c14a7a.png)

- Cobalt Ore: Its an ore found under y: 30 and is used to smelt Cobalt Ingots, which is used to craft Cobalt Armour
  
- Sculk Armour: Sculk Armour is armour with slightly better stats than netherite armour, the recipe is as follows,

![Sculk Helmets and Chestplates Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/030cc37174d4cb75f9042315798f26a04e8d8711_0.webp)

![Sculk Leggings and Boots Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7327396eea51541ec3917921a5aec597785c32d6_0.webp)

- Ender Armour: Ender Armour is armour with slightly better stats than diamond armour, the recipe is as follows,

![Ender Helmet and Chestplate Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/882f5c90b11cab2c97117de78ea3d6959f9b4c74.png)

![Ender Leggings and Boots Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38859e73d87b93aa1e0ef7a578b5abab2b2293dc.png)

And More!

**Notes** 🗒️

  If you want to see all the crafting recipes download the mod REI

If there is any bugs or you want to request for me to add things, please tell me here or check at the attached links https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSffymmTrTcQmB0GYRx6myR6h6tP7WkKdeyTDrX1p4eC_Vkz1w/viewform?usp=dialog
